prompt: Replace the dual LED lamps used for rear license plate illumination with a pair of single LED lamps.
Replace the Plastic Caps mounted onto the doors, hood, and tailgate (total 14) with adhesive stickers.
Replace the rubber bushes used on the wiper blade mounting bolts with the plastic protective cap.
Replace the Steel-Fuel Filler Door Assembly in MGI with a plastic assembly as in KIA.
Reduce the projection of the 'HECTOR' badging on the tailgate at the rear end of the car from 4mm to 2.5mm

Change the design of the lug nut used in MGI with the design of the lug nut used in KIA.
Wheel lug nut in MGI-
Overall length - 31.3mm
Thread length - 27.95mm
Wheel lug nut in KIA-
Overall length - 27.5mm
Thread length - 15mm

De-content the plastic trims found protecting the top tethers from both sides of the seat as the tethers could be placed within the seat fabric itself and a slit on the same could facilitate easy access

Decrease the width of the carpet by 100mm from the lower edge on the rear side of the trunk liner flap.
Eliminate the plastic trim provided around the bottom anchor point at the driver side seatbelt and follow the same methodology provided at the co-driver's side.
Reduce the thickness of the rear wiper pivot bolt cover trim from 2mm to 1.3mm.
De-content the rubber seal provided on the roller arm of each door
Replace fiberboard with velcro tape and carpet in the assembly
